_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.

_contextSnippet: Consistent with Western blot analysis, p-ERK is not easily detectable in CNS tissues from WT animals
details: Successfully used for Western blot analysis to measure p-ERK and total ERK protein levels in minipig tissues for pharmacodynamic assessment
